hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$file" ] && exit 0; case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; pnpm exec eslint --fix "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm exec prettier --write "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; exit 0
